flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Pinellas Technical College-St. Petersburg fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (63.1% → 44.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 28 pp at Pinellas Technical College-St. Petersburg vs the 2003–2007 baseline (53.4% vs 81.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Pinellas Technical College-St. Petersburg rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (655 → 810).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pinellas Technical College-St. Petersburg fell 15% between 2002 and 2003 ($2.2k → $1.8k).
